title: polygala subverticillata
intro: Polygala subverticillata, also known as American jointweed or polygala, is a perennial plant species native to North America that belongs to the milkwort family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that help to reduce swelling and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Polygala subverticillata are attributed to its ability to support respiratory health, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. The plant is commonly prepared as a tea or tincture for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
